# Cache Dataset

## Overview

The Cache Dataset stores temporary benchmark artifacts generated during dataset preparation, preprocessing, and evaluation.

## Purpose

Improve benchmark performance by avoiding repeated computation.

## Contents

- Cached simulations
- Intermediate results
- Temporary metadata
- Processed feature caches

## Intended Use

Cache files are implementation artifacts and should not be considered part of the official benchmark datasets.

## Quality Assurance

Cache contents may be regenerated at any time.

## Version

v1.0
Git commit: Add cache dataset card
